# Product: IERS Rapid Service/Prediction Centre, EOP 14 C04 / Bulletin A.
# Rows   : MJD 59578..59582 (2021-12-30 .. 2022-01-03), lifted verbatim. These
#          are FINAL values for past dates and never change. They bracket the
#          Galileo E11 validation arc (2022-01-01 00:00..08:00 GPS, which spans
#          UTC 2021-12-31 23:59:42 .. 2022-01-01 07:59:42) for per-epoch
#          interpolation of UT1-UTC and the polar-motion pole.
# Columns: fixed-width finals2000A — MJD [8..15], PM-x [19..27],
#          PM-y [38..46], UT1-UTC [59..68]; see src/eop.rs.
# Comment lines (leading '#') and any non-data line are ignored by the parser.
#
